strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Experience with high-throughput microservices (Sociomantic) and fintech-adjacent work (RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems track record in regulated/high-stakes environments
Current title is Senior/Staff IC, not C-level or senior technical leadership at scale-ups

key_factors.factor: Limited production agentic-AI systems track record
Strong distributed systems and full-stack engineering depth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with broad full-stack and distributed-systems experience and some recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the role requires executive-level leadership, proven scaling of engineering organizations, and production multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts — areas where the resume shows limited or no direct evidence.
